いやあ、いい天気だな、クロエ。<br>まさにデート日和って感じだ。: Man, great weather, Chloe. Really feels like perfect date weather.
<user>の手をぎこちなく握り、<br>クロエはカクカクと機械的に頷く。: Chloe awkwardly took 's hand and nodded mechanically.
まあデートってことだし、<br>とりあえずショッピングにでもいくか。: Well, it's a date, so let's do some shopping, I guess.
もっと仲を深めてください……！<br>女性騎士に興味がなくなっちゃうぐらいに！:
Please get closer... to the point where you lose interest in female
knights!
ちゃんと見てますからね！ それじゃあ失礼します！: I'm watching you, you know! Well, I'll be off!
うわぁ……アリシアのやつ、監視までしてるのか。<br>こりゃ逃げられそうにないな: Ugh... Alicia's even monitoring us. No chance of escaping now...
色々と売っているが、興味のあるものは？: There's a lot of stuff here. Anything catch your interest?
クロエはガクガクと揺れながら首を振る。: Chloe trembled and shook her head.
……そ、そうか。<br>まあ軽く見て回って、食事でもするか。: ...Right, well. Let's just look around and then grab a meal.
さて、こっちで勝手に注文してしまったが大丈夫か？<br>何か嫌いなものがあったり:
Anyway, I went ahead and ordered for us. That okay? Any food you
don't like?
やらされてるとはいえデートなのに、<br>１言も喋らないってのはどういうことだっ: I know this is a forced date, but how can you not say a single word!
だ、だって男の人とお出かけなんて初めてで、<br>しかも手を繋いで、なんて……: B-but it's my first time going out with a guy, and holding hands, and...
緊張でドキドキしちゃって、<br>司令官くんとちゃんと話すなんて無理ですよぉ……:
I'm so nervous my heart's pounding—there's no way I can talk
properly with you, Commander...
……そういうことなら、まあいいが。<br>もう少しクロエが話しやすそうな話題を振:
...If that's the case, then fine. Let me think of a topic that might be
easier for Chloe to talk about.
そうだなあ、クロエは仕事以外の時間は何をしているんだ？: So, Chloe, what do you do in your free time?
……きしかつ、というのは？<br>クロエは魔法使いであって、騎士じゃないだろ？: ...'Knightvities'? But you're a mage, not a knight, right?
ああ、一般の方には伝わらないですよねえ。<br>騎士活っていうのは騎士を推す活動:
Ah, that's not something ordinary people understand. Knightvities is
the activity of supporting your favorite knights.
好みの騎士を愛でて応援するファン活動って感じでぇ、<br>影から日向から、邪魔に:
It's a fan activity where you adore and support your favorite
knights—from shadow to open, careful not to intrude but cheering them on.
騎士へのファン活動ね、まあ分かる話だな。<br>街の人も、パレードする姿を見て惚:
So, knight fandom, huh? I can see that. I hear people in town say they
fell for them during their parades.
はい、同好の士もたくさんいる、<br>とても一般的な趣味なんですよ～！:
Yes, there are plenty of like-minded people! It's a very common
hobby!
一般的ってのは嘘だろ、さすがに……: There's no way it's common, surely...
何を隠そう、この基地に来たのも推しを間近で見るためなんです。<br>ずっと異動願:
The truth is, I came to this base to see my favorite knight up close.
I've been submitting transfer requests forever, you know?
女性騎士を見るためだけにこんな最前線に？<br>趣味に命をかけすぎなんじゃないか:
You came to this frontline just to see female knights? That's risking
your life for a hobby, isn't it?
そんなことありませんよぉ。<br>移動を報告したら、界隈からは祝福と嫉妬の嵐だっ:
Not at all! When I reported my transfer, the community was a
whirlwind of congratulations and jealousy!
この前の現場が初めての現地参戦でしたけど、<br>間近で推しが輝くところを見られ:
The last time was my first live show—I was trembling seeing my
favorite knight shine up close!
しかも確定ファンサまでもらっちゃって……！<br>もう尊みが深すぎて昇天しかけま:
And on top of that, I even got confirmed fan service...! The
preciousness was so deep I almost ascended.
するなするな。<br>ソフィアも声をかけただけで天に昇られたら困るだろ。:
Don't do that, don't do that. If Sophia also ascended just from being
spoken to, I'd be in trouble.
ちなみにクロエは誰のファンなんだ？<br>やっぱりソフィアか？: By the way, Chloe, who's your favorite? I'm guessing Sophia?
あー、私は単推しじゃなくミレスガルドの姫騎士箱推しなんですよねぇ。: Ah, I'm not a single-oshi—I'm a box-oshi of the Milesgard knights.
けどあえて誰担かと聞かれたらイラ担ですね。<br>あえてですよ、あえて。:
But if you ask me who I support, I'm an Elizafan. And I say it
deliberately.
ええと、イライザさんを特に推してるってことです。: Um, it means I'm a particular fan of Lady Eliza.
ああ、イライザのイラか。<br>確かにあいつは頼れるからな、応援するのも分かる。: Ah, Eliza. Yeah, she's reliable—I get why you'd be a fan.
なっ……担当の前で能天気にイライザさんを語るなんて……。<br>私が同担拒否じゃ:
Wh-wha...! Talking so casually about Lady Eliza in front of her fan...!
Good thing I'm not one to reject same-fans, Commander!
何がなんだか分からんが、恩の押し売りはやめてくれ！<br>俺は普通に仲間について:
I don't know what you're on about, but don't guilt-trip me! I was just
talking about a comrade!
……ん、よく見ればクロエが腰につけてるそれ、<br>イライザのぬいぐるみなんだな:
... Huh, now that I look, that thing on your waist—it's an Eliza plushie,
isn't it?
あ、そうですそうです！ イラぬいなんです！<br>自分で作ったんですが、我ながら:
Ah, that's right, that's right! It's an Elushie! I made it myself, and it
turned out well, gufufufu...
まあ自給自足は良い文化ではあれど、<br>公式グッズではないので推しへ貢献してな:
Well, DIY is all well and good, but since it's not official merch, there's
the dilemma that I'm not supporting my favorite.
その辺りは公式からの供給不足も１つの原因であって、<br>私の中ではその辺りで折:
That's partly due to the lack of official merchandise, so I've sort of
made peace with it, I suppose.
そりゃ女性騎士のぬいぐるみなんてこっちが作るわけないだろ。<br>いや、売れるな:
Well, we're not going to make female knight plushies. Then again, if
they'd sell, maybe we should think about it...
気軽なメッセージが公式を動かしちゃった……！？<br>嬉しいけど、他担からの目が:
A casual message actually made the official account move...! I'm
happy, but I'm terrified of the attention from other knights' fans...!
他担、ねえ。他の騎士にもファンはいるわけか。<br>クロエは他に好きな騎士はいな:
Other knights have fans too, huh. Chloe, don't you have any favorite
knights from outside Milesgard?
ミレ騎士メインではありますが、他箱もしっかり履修済みですよ。<br>そもそもイラ:
Milesgard knights are my main, but I've thoroughly covered the other
groups too. After all, Eliza herself is from Perdion.
あ、もちろん雑食、ＤＤではありませんよ？<br>それはご理解くださいね！:
Ah, of course I don't like everyone and everything equally! Please
understand that!
推し箱があるからといって他箱を悪く言うのは反対派なんですよね～。<br>おとなり:
Just because I have a favorite group doesn't mean I badmouth other
groups—I'm opposed to that. I understand each group has its own merits.
そういうのを配慮せずにマウント合戦しちゃうような民度じゃ、<br>推しにまで白い:
If the fandom's so low they start one-upmanship wars without
consideration, even our favorites will give us the cold shoulder.
それにぃ、ファンの民度が原因で推しが悪く思われるのは<br>一番情けないことです:
And besides, the most disgraceful thing is when our favorites are
looked down on because of the fans' quality.
……分からん言葉が多すぎる。<br>もう雰囲気で理解しておくぞ。:
...There are too many words I don't understand. I'll just go with the
vibe.
あ、そんな感じでどうぞです。<br>ごめんなさい、騎士活のことになるとついつい喋:
Oh, that's fine! Sorry, when it comes to knight activities, I end up
talking too much...
いや、聞いてて中々面白いぞ。<br>もっと色々教えてくれ。: No, it's actually pretty interesting to listen to. Tell me more.
ええっ！？ 司令官くん、もしかして才能あります？<br>次の現場、一緒に参戦する:
What! Commander, do you have a talent for this? Want to come to the
next event with me? Want to aim for the front row?
俺は現場にいるし、前には出ないんだよ。<br>司令官なんだからな。:
I'm already on the field, and I don't go to the front. I'm the
Commander, after all.
あぁ～、その口ぶりは現場の楽しみを分かってないですね～。<br>いいですか、まず:
Aah, that tone means you don't get the fun of live events. Alright,
first, let me tell you how to find your favorite Princess Knight...
どうしたんだ、やっと話が盛り上がってきたところだぞ。: What's wrong? The conversation was just getting good.
そうですよ、楽しくお話してたのにぃ。: That's right, we were having a nice conversation...
その話の内容が女性騎士の皆さんのことになっちゃってるでしょう！<br>他のことに:
The conversation has become all about the female knights now! We
need to get the Commander interested in other things!
ふあっ！？ そうでした、気づけば推しの話をしちゃってました～！: Ohh! That's right, I got carried away talking about my favorite again!
それじゃダメなんです！<br>デート作戦はいったん中止です！: That's no good! The date operation is on hold for now!
あー、アリシア？<br>いったん、ということはまだ諦めてないのか？: Hey, Alicia? By 'for now,' you mean you haven't given up yet?
もちろんです！ デートでダメだった以上は、最終手段しかありません！<br>覚悟し:
Of course! Since the date didn't work, we have no choice but the final
measure! Be prepared, both of you!
何をやらされるんです、私たち～！: What are you going to make us do!
